title: Letter reporting experiments and paranormal contacts with UFOs in Rio Branco-AC in 1981 [1985]

text_preview:
SEPT 19th, 1985. In a letter addressed to the Ministry of Aeronautics, from the city of São José do Rio Preto, State of São Paulo, a man writes to report “paranormal contacts with unidentified flying objects” during and after a seminar taken place in Rio Branco-AC.

## Following is the translation of the letter: 

## São José do Rio Preto, September 19, 1985.

## Your Excellency Minister of Aeronautics

## We are pleased to contact you, to discuss a matter concerning an operation carried out by SNI and Aeronautics, during the first ADESG seminar held in November 1981 in the city of Rio Branco
summary: A man wrote to the Ministry of Aeronautics claiming that an SNI/FAB 'conditioning operation' during an ADESG seminar in Rio Branco in 1981 triggered paranormal UFO contacts via electrical discharges.
